description: Initialized UCC registration project directory structure and activity log
details: Created directory structure: data/, tools/, plans/, reports/, outreach/emails/, outreach/call_scripts/, outreach/call_transcripts/, applications/. All logging and tracking files initialized.
next_steps: Begin Phase 1 research starting with Alabama through Georgia

details: Built bland_caller.py (API integration module), transcript_parser.py (transcript processing), call_scheduler.py (queue management with timezone/rate limiting). Created .env.example template.

description: Created recording consent laws database for all 50 states + DC
details: Classified each state as one-party or two-party consent. Two-party states: CA, CT, DE, FL, IL, MD, MA, MI, MT, NH, PA, WA. All other states are one-party consent.

description: Researched Alabama Secretary of State UCC Division
details: Alabama has open public access model. No formal authorized searcher program. Free basic search at arc-sos.state.al.us. Advanced search via Alabama Interactive with per-search fees. Optional subscriber account $95-120/year.
next_steps: Register for Alabama Interactive subscriber account

description: Researched Alaska DNR State Recorder's Office UCC Central File
details: Alaska unique - UCC handled by DNR not SOS. Fully open access. Free online index search, no account needed. Online filing requires free registration. 34 recording districts served by 2 offices.
next_steps: Create free filing account at DNR portal

description: Researched Arizona Secretary of State UCC Department
details: Open public access. Free search portal at apps.azsos.gov. No registration required. Prepaid account needed for electronic filing (call to set up). Bulk data available at $1,800-2,000.
next_steps: Free search already available; set up prepaid account if filing needed

description: Researched Arkansas Secretary of State BCS and INA subscriber system
details: No formal authorized searcher program. Online access requires $150/year INA (Information Network of Arkansas) subscription. Paper searches via UCC-11 available without subscription. $6/search fee.

description: Researched California Secretary of State BPD UCC Section
details: Open public access. No authorized searcher program. Free search at bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov. Free account for filing/certified copies. Certified search $5/name online, $10/name mail.

description: Researched Colorado Secretary of State UCC Division
details: Most open state researched. ALL searches free including certified. Online-only system. Free account for certified reports. Free bulk data via Colorado Information Marketplace with SODA API. $8/filing flat fee.
next_steps: Create free account for certified search reports

description: Researched Connecticut Secretary of the State Business Services Division
details: Open public access. Free search at service.ct.gov. Legacy CONCORD system retired June 2021. Free bulk data via CT Open Data Portal with API. $50/filing. $55/certified copy.
next_steps: Create free business.ct.gov account for filing

description: Researched Delaware Division of Corporations UCC program
details: MOST RESTRICTIVE STATE. Mandatory Authorized Searcher program - 25 certified searchers. No public search portal. Program may be closed to new applicants. All searches must go through authorized searchers. $50/debtor minimum.
next_steps: CRITICAL: Contact DOSDOC_ucc@delaware.gov to inquire about Authorized Searcher application

description: Delaware Authorized Searcher program appears closed to new applicants
details: Language on website references 'long-standing relationship with the State' suggesting grandfathered program. Only 25 certified searchers exist. No public application form or process. This is a critical blocker - if RealPC cannot become an authorized searcher, we may need to use an existing authorized searcher as intermediary.
next_steps: Phone and email outreach to Division of Corporations UCC unit

details: Open public access. System privatized since 2001 under FloridaUCC LLC/Docufree. Free search, no account required. Non-standard search logic - all name errors fatal per FL Supreme Court. XML API available for bulk filing.
next_steps: Verify fee schedule; create filing account if needed

description: Researched Georgia Superior Court Clerks' Cooperative Authority (GSCCCA)
details: Georgia unique - UCC through GSCCCA not SOS. Account-based access. Free Limited-Use account for index searches. Paid tiers $14.95-29.95/month for images. Certified search $15/debtor. 159 county clerks feed central index.
next_steps: Create GSCCCA account (free Limited-Use or paid Regular)

description: Completed Phase 1 research for first 10 states (Alabama through Georgia)
details: All 10 states researched with high confidence. Key findings: 7 states have open public access (AL, AK, AZ, CA, CO, CT, FL), 2 states have subscription models (AR, GA), 1 state has mandatory authorized searcher program (DE). Delaware is the only significant blocker.
next_steps: Generate interim progress report; pause for review before continuing to remaining states
